Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses By Defendant Hayes Valley Iii Lp To Plaintiffs Special Interrogatories Set One And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Hayes Valley Iii Lp And Its Attorney
Off Calendar Jan-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2 - PLAINTIFF SAMIRA NEBERAY's Motion To Compel Further Responses By Defendant Hayes Valley Iii Lp To Plaintiffs Special Interrogatories Set One And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Hayes Valley Iii Lp And Its Attorney.

Plaintiff's motion to compel further responses to Special Interrogatories set 1 is GRANTED.

The requests at issue are reasonably calculated to lead to the discovery of admissible evidence. (CCP Section 2017.010.) Plaintiff has shown Defendant Hayes Valley III, LP's responses are incomplete. Defendant Hayes Valley III, LP has not demonstrated that any objection has merit. The court orders Defendant Hayes Valley III, LP to provide further responses to special interrogatories set 1 Nos. 1, 9 through 53. Plaintiff's meet and confer was reasonable. Defendant Hayes Valley III, LP must provide a verification. For the responses to which Defendant Hayes Valley III, LP is claiming a privilege, Defendant shall produce a privilege log. Further responses, verification (if not yet provided) and privilege log due no later than 10 court days from notice of this order.

The court does not find Defendant Hayes Valley III, LP acted with substantial justification. Defendant Hayes Valley III, LP shall pay $900 to Plaintiff in sanctions, payment no later than 10 court days from notice of this order.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling on this motion.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
